isEnum: {property} must be a valid enum value
minLength: {property} must be longer than or equal to {constraints.0} characters
maxLength: {property} must be shorter than or equal to {constraints.0} characters
length: {property} must be longer than or equal to {constraints.0} and shorter than or equal to {constraints.1} characters
isIn: {property} must be one of the following values: {constraints.0}
isNotIn: {property} must not be one of the following values: {constraints.0}
arrayMaxSize: {property} must contain no more than {constraints.0} elements
isDateString: {property} must be a valid ISO 8601 date string
isJSON: {property} must be a valid JSON string
isMobilePhone: {property} must be a valid phone number
isPostalCode: {property} must be a valid postal code
isCreditCard: {property} must be a credit card number
validateNested: nested property {property} must be either object or array
unknownValue: an unknown value was passed to the validate function
